notes: speed_coef=0.70 destroyed hover (2.02s avg) but achieved 0 gates — worse than exp_028 (1.0) which at least passed 1 gate. The phase transition between hover-only (0.55) and crash (0.70) is sharp with no navigation sweet spot. Confirms that exp(-k*dist) proximity reward is fundamentally flawed — it rewards being near gate, not moving toward it. PBRS delta-progress needed.
